title: New view : Automation modal view

posts.author: DevdeVince (Vincent Coval - Devdevils)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I was wondering if is it possible to add a new view regarding tjhe automation set-up.
Just like there is already the possibility to have a modal for oauth connection or field smapping via action input fields, having a custom view to add a wizard to configure part of the automation.
For example, If I want an automation that will backup data to google drive, the possibility through a wizard to select which fordel I want to save the data. And that selection be done when setting-up the automation.
I hope I’m clear.

Regards
Vincent

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @DevdeVince,

I think the authorization URL might be the way to go here

Let me know if you have any questions!

Cheers,
Matias
